title: API Gateway - Creating Resources and Methods

tasks.title: Task 1: Sign in to AWS Management Console

steps.text: Click on the Open Console button, and you will get redirected to AWS Console in a new browser tab.
On the AWS sign-in page,
Leave the Account ID as default. Never edit/remove the 12-digit Account ID present in the AWS Console. Otherwise, you cannot proceed with the lab.
Now copy your Username and Password in the Lab Console to the IAM Username and Password in AWS Console and click on the Sign-in button
Once Signed In to the AWS Management Console, make the default AWS Region as US East (N. Virginia) us-east-1.
In this task, we are going to set up an API in Amazon API Gateway.
Navigate to the Services menu at the top, then click on API Gateway under the Network and Content Delivery section.
Scroll down and click on Build in REST API.
Ignore the pop-up, create your first API.
Then choose New API under Create new API.
Enter API name as Lab API.
Security Policy: Select SecurityPolicy_TLS13.... Policy
Click on Create API Button
You have created, Lab API
In this task, we are going to create a resource within the API.
Once the API is created, click on the Lab API
Click Create Resource button
Resource Name: Enter lab
Once you enter the resource name, click on Create Resource.
Once you have created the resource, click on Create Method. Select Get from the dropdown list of Method Type.
Select the Integration Type as Mock and click on Create Method.
Do You Know?

API Gateway is built to handle high levels of traffic and concurrency, making it suitable for a wide range of applications, from small projects to large-scale enterprise systems. It automatically scales to accommodate varying levels of API traffic, ensuring that applications can handle a significant number of concurrent requests without compromising performance or reliability.
Once the lab steps are completed, please click on the Validation button on the right side panel.
This will validate the resources in the AWS account and displays whether you have completed this lab successfully or not.
Sample output :
Completion and Conclusion
You have successfully created an API.
You have successfully created an API resource and method.
End Lab
Sign out of the AWS Account.
You have successfully completed the lab.
Once you have completed the steps click on End Lab from the lab console.
